history.content:
AI Engineering is an engineering discipline focused on building reliable, efficient, and scalable machine learning systems across various computational platforms. It spans the entire lifecycle of AI systems, including data acquisition, model development, system integration, deployment, and operations, with an emphasis on resource-awareness and system-level optimization. This field emerged to reflect the practical realities of deploying AI in production environments. (Reference: [1], [3])

In modern AI systems, AI Engineering plays a crucial role by integrating and optimizing systems for real-world deployment. (Reference: [5])

AI Engineering is an engineering discipline focused on building reliable, efficient, and scalable machine learning systems across various computational platforms. It spans the entire lifecycle of AI systems, including data acquisition, model development, system integration, deployment, and operations, with an emphasis on resource-awareness and system-level optimization. This field emerged to reflect the practical realities of deploying AI in production environments. (Reference: [1], [3])

In modern AI systems, AI Engineering plays a crucial role by integrating and optimizing systems for real-world deployment. (Reference: [5])
